name: throne room
hints: There is a treasure here. Take it and head back the way you came.
GET CROWN - it is one of the 13 treasures. Go WEST to return to the ledge.
GET CROWN then go WEST back to the ledge. JUMP across the chasm and retrace your steps to bring it to the stump.
notes: Contains the gold crown treasure. Only accessible after feeding the bear on the ledge (room 21). WEST returns to the ledge.
